title: [quadlet][rootless][selinux] quadlet generated service files are inaccessible for confined selinux user
body:
### Issue description

Using quadlet results in .service files that are inaccessible to a confined selinux user such as `staff_u`.

### Steps to reproduce

Create new user
```console
# useradd -Z staff_u <podman_user>
```

Ensure user can run necessary commands within selinux bounds
```console
# cat /etc/sudoers.d/podman
podman ALL=(podman:podman) ROLE=container_user_r TYPE=container_user_t /usr/bin/podman
podman ALL=(podman:podman) TYPE=systemd_systemctl_exec_t /usr/bin/systemctl  
```

Create container quadlet

```console
$ cat ~/.config/containers/systemd/mysleep.container 
[Unit]
Description=The sleep container
After=local-fs.target

[Container]
Image=registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-minimal:latest
Exec=sleep 1000

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
````
Load service
```console
$ systemctl --user daemon-reload
```
Ensure service was created
```console
$ ls -lZ /var/run/user/<uid>/systemd/generator/
total 4
...
-rw-r--r--. 1 podman podman staff_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 889 Nov 27 15:53 mysleep.service
```

Running service command for existing services poses no problem.
```console
$ systemctl --user status podman-auto-update
○ podman-auto-update.service - Podman auto-update service
     Loaded: loaded (/usr/lib/systemd/user/podman-auto-update.service; disabled; preset: disabled)
     Active: inactive (dead)
       Docs: man:podman-auto-update(1)
```

But running container service command, e.g. `status`, `start`, ... fails. 
```console
$ systemctl --user status mysleep.service
Failed to get properties: Access denied
```


### Workaround

Change seuser to `unconfined_u`:
```
# usermod -Z unconfined_u <podman_user>
```
```
# restorecon -RvF /home/<podman_user>
```

Run service
```console
$ systemctl --user start mysleep.service
$ systemctl --user status mysleep.service
● mysleep.service - The sleep container
     Loaded: loaded (/home/podman/.config/containers/systemd/mysleep.container; generated)
     Active: active (running) since Wed 2024-11-27 16:13:50 CET; 16s ago
   Main PID: 29510 (conmon)
      Tasks: 3 (limit: 98964)
     Memory: 17.9M
        CPU: 401ms
     CGroup: /user.slice/user-<uid>.slice/user@<uid>.service/app.slice/mysleep.service
             ├─libpod-payload-d165a94f15b145a469b0031b184986c090f3a00d8694ccf5b4c9f12a64dc0353
             │ └─29512 /usr/bin/coreutils --coreutils-prog-shebang=sleep /usr/bin/sleep 1000
             └─runtime
               ├─29506 /usr/bin/pasta --config-net --dns-forward 169.254.0.1 -t none -u none -T none -U none --no-map-gw --quiet --netns /run/user/2816/netns/netns-f0dddf4d-6b33-b9fe-7f22-5d5412a7be>
               └─29510 /usr/bin/conmon --api-version 1 -c d165a94f15b145a469b0031b184986c090f3a00d8694ccf5b4c9f12a64dc0353 -u d165a94f15b145a469b0031b184986c090f3a00d8694ccf5b4c9f12a64dc0353 -r /usr>
lines 1-13/13 (END)
```

### System information

#### SYSTEM

```console
$ podman --version
podman version 5.2.2
```

```console
$ podman info | head -n 8
host:
  arch: amd64
  buildahVersion: 1.37.5
  cgroupControllers:
  - memory
  - pids
  cgroupManager: systemd
  cgroupVersion: v2
```

```console
$ cat /etc/os-release 
NAME="AlmaLinux"
VERSION="9.5 (Teal Serval)"
ID="almalinux"
ID_LIKE="rhel centos fedora"
VERSION_ID="9.5"
...
```

System is installed with DSA STIG security profile, see [here](https://wiki.almalinux.org/documentation/openscap-guide-for-9.html) and [here](https://static.open-scap.org/ssg-guides/ssg-rhel9-guide-stig_gui.html)
```console
$ fips-mode-setup --check
FIPS mode is enabled.
```

#### USER

```console
$ id
uid=<uid>(podman) gid=<uid>(podman) groups=<uid>(podman) context=staff_u:staff_r:staff_t:s0
```

```console
# cat /etc/sudoers.d/podman
podman ALL=(podman:podman) ROLE=container_user_r TYPE=container_user_t /usr/bin/podman
podman ALL=(podman:podman) TYPE=systemd_systemctl_exec_t /usr/bin/systemctl  
```

#### FILE PERMISSIONS

```console
$ ls -lZ .config/containers/systemd/
total 4
-rw-------. 1 podman podman staff_u:object_r:config_home_t:s0 223 Nov 27 13:32 mysleep.container
```
```console
$ ls -lZ /var/run/user/<uid>/systemd/generator/
total 4
...
-rw-r--r--. 1 podman podman staff_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 889 Nov 27 15:53 mysleep.service
```

### LOG

Relevant log
```console
# ausearch -m AVC,USER_AVC,SELINUX_ERR,USER_SELINUX_ERR -ts recent | grep mysleep
Nov 27 14:16:21 Gandalf systemd[1847]: selinux: avc:  denied  { status } for auid=n/a uid=<UID> gid=<UID> path="/run/user/<UID>/systemd/generator/mysleep.service" cmdline="" function="mac_selinux_filter" scontext=staff_u:staff_r:staff_t:s0 tcontext=staff_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 tclass=service permissive=0
```

comments.body:
Do you mean this?

```console
# ausearch -m AVC,USER_AVC,SELINUX_ERR,USER_SELINUX_ERR -ts recent | grep mysleep
Nov 27 14:16:21 Gandalf systemd[1847]: selinux: avc:  denied  { status } for auid=n/a uid=<UID> gid=<UID> path="/run/user/<UID>/systemd/generator/mysleep.service" cmdline="" function="mac_selinux_filter" scontext=staff_u:staff_r:staff_t:s0 tcontext=staff_u:object_r:user_tmp_t:s0 tclass=service permissive=0
```

```
# useradd -Z staff_u poduser
$ systemctl --user daemon-reload
$ ls /run/user/$UID/systemd/generator/
$ systemctl --user status nginx.service
Failed to get properties: Access denied
```

rhel 9 system, rootless mode, `staff_u` type user cannot use `systemctl --user` command.
